ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exceptions" (
  "exception_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exception */,
  "exception_name" TEXT /* Name of the exception */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the exception */,
  "real_mode" INTEGER /* Indicates if the exception occurs in real mode */,
  "virtual_mode" INTEGER /* Indicates if the exception occurs in virtual mode */,
  "protected_mode" INTEGER /* Indicates if the exception occurs in protected mode */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Potential cause of the exception */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the exception */,
  "solution" TEXT /* Recommended solution for the exception */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exception was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exception was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exception_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_mode" (
  "real_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for real mode exception */,
  "exception_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exception */,
  "real_mode_details" TEXT /* Details specific to real mode */,
  "mode_specific_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the exception in real mode */,
  "mode_specific_solution" TEXT /* Solution for the exception in real mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("real_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_mode_exception_id FOREIGN KEY ("exception_id") REFERENCES exceptions ("exception_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "virtual_mode" (
  "virtual_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for virtual mode exception */,
  "exception_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exception */,
  "virtual_mode_details" TEXT /* Details specific to virtual mode */,
  "mode_specific_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the exception in virtual mode */,
  "mode_specific_solution" TEXT /* Solution for the exception in virtual mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("virtual_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_mode_exception_id FOREIGN KEY ("exception_id") REFERENCES exceptions ("exception_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protected_mode" (
  "protected_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for protected mode exception */,
  "exception_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exception */,
  "protected_mode_details" TEXT /* Details specific to protected mode */,
  "mode_specific_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the exception in protected mode */,
  "mode_specific_solution" TEXT /* Solution for the exception in protected mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protected_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protected_mode_exception_id FOREIGN KEY ("exception_id") REFERENCES exceptions ("exception_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignment_issues" (
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for alignment issue */,
  "exception_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exception */,
  "alignment_details" TEXT /* Details specific to alignment issue */,
  "alignment_type" TEXT /* Type of alignment issue */,
  "alignment_solution" TEXT /* Solution for the alignment issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_issues_exception_id FOREIGN KEY ("exception_id") REFERENCES exceptions ("exception_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_protection" (
  "protection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for memory protection setting */,
  "exception_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exception */,
  "protection_details" TEXT /* Details specific to memory protection setting */,
  "protection_level" TEXT /* Level of memory protection */,
  "protection_solution" TEXT /* Solution for the memory protection issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_protection_exception_id FOREIGN KEY ("exception_id") REFERENCES exceptions ("exception_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_faults" (
  "page_fault_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for page fault */,
  "exception_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exception */,
  "page_fault_details" TEXT /* Details specific to page fault */,
  "fault_type" TEXT /* Type of page fault */,
  "fault_solution" TEXT /* Solution for the page fault */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_fault_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_faults_exception_id FOREIGN KEY ("exception_id") REFERENCES exceptions ("exception_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the developer */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or department of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exception_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer */,
  "exception_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exception */,
  "encounter_date" TEXT /* Date when the exception was encountered */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution or notes on resolving the exception */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level of the exception */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the exception */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exception_logs_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exception_logs_exception_id FOREIGN KEY ("exception_id") REFERENCES exceptions ("exception_id")
)
